# CWE-215 negative: debug log omits secret material (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-215-safe.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"encoding/json"
	"log"
	"net/http"
)

// CWE-215 Insertion of Sensitive Information Into Debugging Code (mitigated)
func LogRequestState(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	if r.Method != http.MethodPost {
		http.Error(w, "method", http.StatusMethodNotAllowed)
		return
	}
	traceID := r.Header.Get("X-Trace-Id")
	log.Printf("request debug trace=%s uri=%s method=%s", traceID, r.URL.RequestURI(), r.Method)
	w.Header().Set("Content-Type", "application/json")
	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
	_ = json.NewEncoder(w).Encode(map[string]string{"status": "logged"})
}
